eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Snohomish, WA; at 7:52 AM on JUL 12, 2026 Effective until 8:22 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: this is a test, only a test of the emergency Alert System, from Snohomish County 911. Had this been an actual alert this system would bring you important information. No action is needed this is only a test.
